namespace.patternError: namespace must consist of lower case alphanumeric characters or '-', and must start and end with an alphanumeric character (e.g. 'my-name',  or '123-abc', regex used for validation is ^[a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?$

viewSpec.layoutDescription: Set a password for the Grafana admin. It must be at least 15 characters long and include a number, a lowercase letter, an uppercase letter, and one of these symbols: !@#$%^&*-

inputProps.description: Use the YAML editor to set application parameters. Parameters set in compose mode are not automatically applied to the application settings tab.

data.defaultValue:
grafana:
  nebius:
    projectId: REPLACE WITH PROJECT ID
    accessToken: REPLACE WITH ACCESS TOKEN

  persistence:
    enabled: true
    size: 10Gi

  resources:
    requests: # https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/setup-grafana/installation/kubernetes/#minimum-hardware-requirements
      cpu: 250m
      memory: 750Mi

  service:
    annotations:
      nebius.com/MarketplaceServiceAccess: title=Grafana,ssl=false,type=web,port=service

  datasources:
    datasources.yaml:
      apiVersion: 1
      datasources:
        - name: Nebius Services
          type: prometheus
          access: proxy
          url: 'https://read.monitoring.api.nebius.cloud/projects/{{ .Values.nebius.projectId }}/service-provider/prometheus'
          jsonData:
            httpHeaderName1: 'Authorization'
          secureJsonData:
            httpHeaderValue1: 'Bearer {{ .Values.nebius.accessToken }}'
          isDefault: true
          version: 1

        - name: Nebius Monitoring
          type: prometheus
          access: proxy
          url: 'https://read.monitoring.api.nebius.cloud/projects/{{ .Values.nebius.projectId }}/prometheus'
          jsonData:
            httpHeaderName1: 'Authorization'
          secureJsonData:
            httpHeaderValue1: 'Bearer {{ .Values.nebius.accessToken }}'
          isDefault: false
          version: 1

        - name: Nebius Logging
          type: loki
          access: proxy
          url: 'https://read.logging.api.nebius.cloud/projects/{{ .Values.nebius.projectId }}'
          jsonData:
            httpHeaderName1: 'Authorization'
          secureJsonData:
            httpHeaderValue1: 'Bearer {{ .Values.nebius.accessToken }}'
          isDefault: false
          version: 1

        - name: Nebius Tracing
          type: tempo
          access: proxy
          url: 'https://read.tracing.api.nebius.cloud/projects/{{ .Values.nebius.projectId }}/tempo'
          jsonData:
            httpHeaderName1: 'Authorization'
          secureJsonData:
            httpHeaderValue1: 'Bearer {{ .Values.nebius.accessToken }}'
          isDefault: false
          version: 1

  dashboardProviders:
    dashboardproviders.yaml:
      apiVersion: 1
      providers:
        - name: nebius
          disableDeletion: false
          editable: true
          options:
            path: /var/lib/grafana/dashboards/nebius

  dashboards:
    nebius:
      nebius-disk:
        gnetId: 23425  # https://grafana.com/dashboards/23425
        revision: 2
      nebius-gpu:
        gnetId: 23423  # https://grafana.com/dashboards/23423
        revision: 2
      nebius-object-storage:
        gnetId: 23392  # https://grafana.com/dashboards/23392
        revision: 5
      nebius-shared-filesystems:
        gnetId: 23313  # https://grafana.com/dashboards/23313
        revision: 5
      nebius-observability:
        gnetId: 24246  # https://grafana.com/dashboards/24246
        revision: 2
      node-exporter-full:
        gnetId: 1860  # https://grafana.com/dashboards/1860
        revision: 40
        datasource:
          - name: DS_PROMETHEUS
            value: '${datasource}'
